rules.title: No TOCTOU in file operations
rules.description: Do not use os.path.exists() or os.path.isdir() before open(). Directly attempt open() and catch FileNotFoundError/IsADirectoryError. Check-then-operate is a race condition vulnerability.

rules.title: Error codes must derive from type, not message text
rules.description: Error codes in ErrorSignal must be determined by the validator type or a defined mapping, not by string matching on error_detail messages. String-based derivation produces undefined codes when messages change.

rules.title: Index-keyed containers must maintain list-index consistency on overwrite
rules.description: When a signal/artifact with the same index key is overwritten, the backing list must not retain stale entries. Inconsistent list-index state causes false positive collision detection and stale reads.
